message:
Merge PR #2514: Fix Docker dashboard port forwarding

Configurable DASHBOARD_PORT env var, default port changed to 8080,
and dashboard binds to 0.0.0.0 in sandbox mode for container access.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2514
Author: pento (Gary Pendergast)

Co-authored-by: Gary Pendergast <pento@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -131,6 +131,7 @@ gt mayor attach
 export GIT_USER="<your name>"
 export GIT_EMAIL="<your email>"
 export FOLDER="/Users/you/code"
+export DASHBOARD_PORT=8080  # optional, host port for the web dashboard
 
 docker compose build              # only needed on first run or after code changes
 docker compose up -d

@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ services:
       - agent-home:/home/agent
       - ${FOLDER}:/gt
     ports:
-      - "3000:3000"
+      - "${DASHBOARD_PORT:-8080}:8080"
     command: sleep infinity
 
     # Exec into the container with: docker compose exec gastown zsh
